action.reasoning: Starting fresh. I'll implement a DenseNet-121 encoder + Transformer decoder for HMER (Handwritten Math Expression Recognition). The approach: 1) DenseNet-121 feature extractor, 2) 2D positional encoding, 3) Transformer decoder with attention. I'll train for a few epochs first to validate the pipeline and measure iteration time.
